index_tip_move.name: Move Cursor
index_tip_move.description: Point index finger — tip controls cursor like a touchpad

pinch_index_thumb.name: Left Click
pinch_index_thumb.description: Pinch index finger and thumb together

pinch_middle_thumb.name: Right Click
pinch_middle_thumb.description: Pinch middle finger and thumb together

double_pinch_index_thumb.name: Double Click
double_pinch_index_thumb.description: Quick double pinch — index finger and thumb

pinch_hold_move.name: Click & Drag
pinch_hold_move.description: Pinch index+thumb and hold while moving hand

two_finger_swipe_up.name: Scroll Up
two_finger_swipe_up.description: Raise index + middle fingers, swipe up

two_finger_swipe_down.name: Scroll Down
two_finger_swipe_down.description: Raise index + middle fingers, swipe down

two_finger_swipe_left.name: Scroll Left / Back
two_finger_swipe_left.description: Raise index + middle fingers, swipe left

two_finger_swipe_right.name: Scroll Right / Forward
two_finger_swipe_right.description: Raise index + middle fingers, swipe right

pinch_spread.name: Zoom In
pinch_spread.description: Spread thumb and index finger apart

pinch_close.name: Zoom Out
pinch_close.description: Bring thumb and index finger together

fist_closed.name: Grab / Hold
fist_closed.description: Close all fingers into a fist — grab selected item

palm_swipe_left.name: Virtual Desktop Left
palm_swipe_left.description: Open palm, swipe left — switch to left virtual desktop

palm_swipe_right.name: Virtual Desktop Right
palm_swipe_right.description: Open palm, swipe right — switch to right virtual desktop

palm_swipe_up.name: Task View / Mission Control
palm_swipe_up.description: Open palm, swipe up — open Windows Task View

palm_swipe_down.name: Show Desktop
palm_swipe_down.description: Open palm, swipe down — minimize all windows

three_finger_tap.name: Action Center
three_finger_tap.description: Three fingers pointing up, tap — open Action Center

four_finger_tap.name: Alt+Tab
four_finger_tap.description: Four fingers pointing up, tap — switch app

ok_sign.name: Play / Pause
ok_sign.description: OK sign (index+thumb circle, others extended) — play/pause media

two_finger_right_swipe_quick.name: Next Track
two_finger_right_swipe_quick.description: Quick two-finger swipe right — next media track

two_finger_left_swipe_quick.name: Previous Track
two_finger_left_swipe_quick.description: Quick two-finger swipe left — previous media track

l_shape.name: New Tab
l_shape.description: L-shape with thumb and index — open new browser tab

x_fingers_cross.name: Close Tab
x_fingers_cross.description: Cross index and middle fingers — close current tab

five_finger_spread.name: Close Window
five_finger_spread.description: Spread all five fingers wide — close active window

write_in_air.name: Air Writing (Experimental)
write_in_air.description: Trace letters with index finger tip in the air — text input

draw_circle.name: Rotate / Spin
draw_circle.description: Draw a circle in the air — rotate selected object

wrist_tilt_left.name: Tilt / Rotate Left
wrist_tilt_left.description: Tilt wrist counter-clockwise — rotate selection left

wrist_tilt_right.name: Tilt / Rotate Right
wrist_tilt_right.description: Tilt wrist clockwise — rotate selection right
